T = date of transaction in mutual fund units in India 
5) What is cut off timing and its role in determining the applicable NAV for transactions 
in Mutual Fund scheme (s)? 
The purchase and redemption are done at the applicable NAV. In order to ensure fairness to 
investors, SEBI has prescribed cut-off timings which are uniformly applicable for all mutual funds. 
These are provided below: 
 
Type of Scheme
